metadata.description: Claude Code plugins from Code Katz: named specialist personas with model tiers, and parallel-session coordination with merge-order tracking.

plugins.name: claude-team
plugins.description: Twelve named specialist personas: session-scoped /name switching, delegation subagents with Fable/Opus/Sonnet model tiers, a persona session launcher (claude-team launch), and coordinator workflows with branch hygiene.

plugins.name: claude-conductor
plugins.description: Track and coordinate parallel Claude Code sessions: SESSIONS.md registry with personas and dependency-aware merge order, live dashboard with per-session cost, and hooks that auto-link sessions and keep statuses updating themselves.

plugins.name: claude-todo
plugins.description: Per-project TODOS.md scratchpad: two-second capture for ideas and tasks that must survive the session, with persona routing and parallel/blocked grouping. Complements (does not replace) Claude Code's session-scoped native task list.

plugins.name: claude-plans
plugins.description: Archive finalized implementation plans to project-local plans/ directories with lifecycle status (active, executed, superseded, rejected) and a global index for cross-project lookup.
